settings.title: Uñstawakanaka

engines.bassoonDesc: Uñi'ataki .xm / .mod. Chiptune3 uñt'ayañataki, ukhamaraki FFmpeg yaqha formatanakaru.
engines.chiptune3Desc: 20+ jukunaña tracker format uñt'ayasi (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Yaqha formatanakatakix FFmpeg ukaruw kut'ayasi.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Tuk aruspa arxata uñt'ayañataki MP3 ukar tukuyi. Juk'amp aski yanapa, juk'amp jayra qallta.

settings.engineDesc: Jukus uñt'ayaña kuna audio motor apanañataki. Chiptune3 yanapt'atawa wali aski tracker format uñt'ayañataki.

intro.title: Yatiña

tutorialMock.annotScopes: Sapa kanal uñt'ayawi — sapa t'uqa mä audio kanal tiempo real uñacht'ayi
tutorialMock.labelFilter: Uñt'ayawi uñt'ayiri: Taqi / Munanaka / Nayra yatiyawi  |  Thaqhaña qillqata: thaqhaña sutimp jan ukax t'itulumpi

tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: "Formato" uñt'ayaña sasaxa, juk'amp jilata ajllirinaka uñstayapxañataki · Canal/Tamaño uñstayirinaka aynacht'ayaña · Juk'amp jilata yänaka uñstayapxañataki
tutorialMock.annotAccount: Qillqasitayäwi qhispi · Sapa munasitaki uñt’ayasiñataki uñt’ayasiñawa · Jan k’atukipxañani, jan phuqhachasiñani

intro.tutorialStep5Body: Jukuta qillqata qillqaspa yanapaykunata jark'ayta atikunapaq:
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Uñchhasiñawa Tracker Player ukax mä qhanañchäwiwa. Aka qhanañchäwixa Tracker Player ukax mä qhanañchäwiwa. Uñt'ayasiñataki, qhanañchäwixa mä qhanañchäwiwa.
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player uñt'ayasiñatakiwa. Uñt'ayawi uñt'ayasiñataki, gear icon (patan uñt'ayawi) ukatx Settings (ch'iqan uñt'ayawi) ukanakampiw uñt'ayasiñamawa.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , uñataki Amiga MOD/XM tracker JavaScript pura Steffest lurat, tracker playback clásico uñt'ayawi. Kay jichha, proyecto Chiptune3 (libopenmpt uñt'ayawi WebAssembly motor) y FFmpeg servidor lado transcoding uñt'ayawi, formatos uñt'ayawi MOD/XM uñt'ayawi 68 formatos uñt'ayawi.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Uñax jichhürunakanxa, tracker música global demoscene comunidadanxa ukat retro computación amawt'asinakana wali askiwa. Tracker Player, computadora música historia apnaqiri aka mayacht'ata arte forma, mayacht'ata interfaz ukat aski interacción tuqita, juk'amp jaqinakar uñt'ayasiñatakiwa.
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player nayaxa uñt'ayatawa, maya jisk'a MOD/XM player ukhata. Akawa jach'a yanakapa uñt'ayiri:
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Uñt'ayaw maya takiy playlistanxa, qallt'ayañataki. Reproductorax jank'aki uñstayi — yaqha archivos uñt'ayasiñapatakix maya segundot juk'at juk'arakikiw qallt'ayi. Mä takiy uñt'ayasïna, aka uñjätawa:
intro.creditsVueDesc: JavaScript uñanchawi uñt'ayiri, uñt'ayasiñataki uñt'ayata. Vue uñt'ayawi, uñt'ayasiñataki uñt'ayata, uñt'ayasiñataki uñt'ayata, uñt'ayasiñataki uñt'ayata.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: W3C Web Audio API especificación uñataki baja-latencia, sin-glitch procesamiento de audio ukax mä dedicado hilo en tiempo real ukan. AudioWorklet ukansti Chiptune3 motor uñt'ayasi libopenmpt WASM compilado ukan, independiente del hilo principal UI, uñt'ayasi playback suave ukan sin importar actividad de interfaz.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Tailwind uñanchasqa CSS framework, estilowan ruwanapaq. Tailwindpa diseño token sistema ninqa 16-tema arquitecturanchista atichin — sapa color, shadow, border activo tema adaptakun CSS custom propiedades nisqawan, Tailwind configuraciónmanta generasqa.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: LLVM uñanchasqa compilador herramienta cadena, C/C++ código WebAssemblyman t'ikraq. Emscripten uñanchaspaq patcha libopenmpt nisqata compilanapaq — chaymanta kikin waveform_processor nisqata — huk ch'ulla archivo WASM móduloman, navegador AudioWorklet nisqapi qaylla nativo velocidadpi ejecutaq.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Uñt'ayatawa Steffest. Amiga MOD ukat XM trackers clásico ProTracker ukat FastTracker II ukan JavaScript qillqatanakapampi mayacht'atawa. BassoonTracker ukanx ch'amanchiri, junt'uma playback uñt'ayatawa, aka proyecto qallt'ayiri, 4-channel MOD clásico ukat multi-channel XM ukanakamp chika, envelopes, filters, ukat effects ukanakamp chika.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player uñt'ayasiwa suma open-source ecosistema ukan jak'ankirinakana p'iqinchasitapa. Taqi 135,400+ track libreriyaxa The Mod Archive ukat apsutawa — uka internetana tracker música uñt'ayiri mayjt'ayiriwa. Taqi yanapt'irinakaruxa suma yuspärañaniwa, aka proyecto uka lurawinakapampi lurawiñapataki.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Nayruru taki sapa Tracker Player ukaxa maya juk’ampis mayjt’ayaña URL-niwa. Kunawsatix maya taki uñt’ayatäki ukhaxa, navegador chimpu chimpun link apthapita — uñacht’ayasispa /song/123456/filename.mod. Uñt’ayam masinakamar, apthapim redes sociales ukanakana, jan ukaxa uñt’ayam qhipaman. Link-axa ukhamarakiwa uka taki uñt’ayani.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Vue.js meta-framework uñanchayninchiqtaq ñawpaqninpiwan qhipa laya ruwanakunata atiyachin. Nuxtqa p'anqa apaykachayta utqhayachin, SEOpaq allin, Nitro servidor API ñankunapaq, SQLite base de datos tinkinakuy, chaymanta código kikinmanta t'aqay atiy allin ruwanapaq.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Tracker taki aruskiñapa (module taki ukat MOD taki satawa) ukax mä juk’ampis mayjt’ayata taki forma digital uñt’ayatawa, 1980 maran qhipa patrunakana, Commodore Amiga ordenadoranxa. MP3 ukat streaming audio uñt’ayatanakamp ch’amanchañataki, tracker archivos ukanakaxa taqi taki qillqata (notas, patrones, efectos) ukat instrumento muestras ukanakampi apani — mä kikpa taki proyecto archivo uñt’ayata. Ukaxa tracker archivos ukanakaxa sum jisk’a uñt’ayatawa, ukhamaraki taki complejidad inapagable uñt’ayata.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Uñt'ayatawa DrSnuggles tuqitxa — JavaScript qillqatanaka utt'ayiri, libopenmpt uñt'ayiri, AudioWorklet ukanxa 68+ tracker formatonaka uñt'ayiri. Aka yanakapañatakixa, AudioWorklet procesador uñt'ayapxtana per-channel waveform data (multi-channel oscilloscopes uñt'ayiri), automatic gain control yapxtana, ukat race-condition handling ch'amachapxtana rapid track switching uñt'ayiri. Chiptune3 uñt'ayiriwa browser Web Audio API ukat patched libopenmpt build uñt'ayiri, ukatwa mayjt'ayiri default engine.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Uñ jisk'a layawax Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker uñt'ayatawa 1987 marana, ukat juk'amp ch'amanchatawa demoscene uksa — maya k'ach'a subcultura uksana, ukhamana programadores, músicos ukat artistas competiñapuniwa suma audiovisual obras lurañataki. Juk'amp maranakanxa, yaqha yaqha tracker formatos uñstayatawa, sapa maynix mä jach'a límite uñt'ayapxäna: juk'amp canales, juk'amp suma efectos, instrumentos sintetizados, VST plugin yanapa, ukat jan ukaxa mä tukuyaña mezcla capacidad. Jichhürunakanxa, tracker escenaxa activo uñt'atawa mundo tuqinxa, machaqa música uñstayatawa sapa uru The Mod Archive uñt'ata sitios uksanxa.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Apachiyta OpenMPT yanq'akunawan. Qhapaq kicha pukyu qhapaq tracker waqachina librería, 68+ módulo formatukunata mana pantaspa yanapan. Ñuqayku libopenmptpa C pukyu código nintam huk'uchayku — sapan canal PCM willaykunata mixer ukhupi hap'iq, qhipa lluqsiy ñawpaqta — chaymanta WebAssemblyman Emscriptenwan t'inkispa t'inkiyku. Ñuqaykupa allichasqa WASM ruwayninqa Chiptune3wan apamuykuq up-stream pre-compilado binariota rantin, sapan canal oscilloscopiokunata atichispa, 68+ formatukunapaq decoding suni t'inkiyta ruwaspa.

tutorialStep1Filters: Channels Uñt'ayiri — Uñt'ayasiñataki chanelnak jakhumpi: 4 chanelnaka (clásico MOD pacha), 8 chanelnaka, jan ukax 8+ chanelnaka (moderno multitrack).
Tamaño Filtro — Filtra por tamaño de archivo: pequeño (<100KB), mediano o grande (>1MB).
Tracker Sutichawi Sutichawi — Sutichawi sutichawi sutichawi (ukhamaraki, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") sutichawi sutichawi sutichawi sutichawi sutichawi sutichawi sutichawi sutichawi.
Ajllawiña Tuqinaka — Uñt’ayawiña apnaqawiña ID, sutimp, qillqata sutimp, chhikantimp, mayakipt’awiña urumpi, wich’inkhuña jan ukaxa jichhata nayrata.
Ajlliriña Apanaqa — Mayjt’ayaña Taqi takinakana, Munañanakamana, ukat Uñt’ayäwimana.
tutorialStep2Details: Qillqa Willaykuna — Suti, llimphiq, formatu, kanal jakhu, taki yupay rikuchisqa pukllachiq kamachiqkunamanta patanpi.
Jan uywaña/Jan uywaña & Yawinaka — Jan uywaña/Jan uywaña jach'a botón ukat playback modo ajlliri: Ch'iqita (maymaya), Ordenampi (seqüencial), Maysatu, Ukat jichhür jayt'asiña.
Nayriri Takiyä Qhipa — Takiyä qhiparu mä juk’a qhiparu sarañataki, jan ukax mä juk’a qhiparu sarañataki, jan ukax mä juk’a qhiparu sarañataki, jan ukax mä juk’a qhiparu sarañataki.
Volumen & Progreso — Ajusta el volumen con el control deslizante, navega por la pista y ve el tiempo transcurrido/restante.
Uñt'ayaña — Uñt'ayat tracker archiwu aparakiña ukanakamaru.
ModArchive Uñt'awi — Qillqat thakhi uñstayi The Mod Archive uksana, juk'amp yatiñataki yanapt'asipxañataki.

Tema — Ajllawi 16 colores tema. Tema qhananchirinaka: Qhana, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, Gray. Tema ch'usajirinaka: Ch'usaj, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, Green.
Aru — 52 aru uñt'äwi. Ukhamaw jumampiwa uñt'ata.
Volumen — Uñstawi un volumen por defecto ukhamaraki mä juk’a pachatakiw mayiñataki sapa trackan.
Ch'uñuñawi Normalización — Sapa kuti uñstayäwi apayachäwi uñt'ayäwi uñt'ayäwi uñt'ayäwi (sapa kuti uñt'ayäwi).
Uñt'ayawi Max Loop Count — Tracker takiñanakax wali juk'amp loop lurasi. Uñt'ayawi maya max loop count ukax janiw wali juk'amp playback uñt'ayasïñapataki (default: 1).
Uñacht'awi Toggles — Uñacht'ayaña jan ukax ch'amañchaña uñacht'awi, patrón uñacht'awi, ukat yatiyawi amtawi.

Imaynalla — Cuenta uñxatt’iwa mä juk’a munasiñanakampi uñt’ayatanakampi. Janiw kuna mä jikxatata información apthapisiñanakasa, jan ukaxa uñstayasiñanakasa.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: 135,400+ q'uchu taki qillqatanaka, 68+ uñt'ayatanaka, 4-kanal MOD uñt'ayata 256-kanal epicas uñt'ayata.

Arquitectura de triple motor: BassoonTracker (JS clásico), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM) y FFmpeg (transcodificación del lado del servidor) — seleccionado automáticamente para cada archivo.
WebGL uñt'ayata pachpa yatiyiri qillqata uñt'ayawi — qillqatanakax uñjasiñataki, mayacht'ata qillqata uñt'ayawinxa uñjasiñataki.
Uñanchaykunap chanin muyuriq rikch'akuna — sapa chaninpa uyarina lluqsiyninta rikuna kawsay muyuriq rikch'a hina, C-nivel muyuriq qhawariywan kallpachasqa.
Diseño responsivo que se adapta hermosamente a cualquier pantalla: escritorio, tableta o teléfono — incluyendo modo de patrón horizontal para pantalla ancha.
16 juk'atpachani uñt'ayata sami uñt'awi — qhana qhana sami uñt'awitxa, ch'iyar ch'iyar chika arum sami uñt'awikama, inti jalsu sami uñt'awi, junt'u quri sami uñt'awi, ukatxa taqi kunana uñt'awi.
